fate.en: They believe it was fate that they met.
fate.zh: 他們相信相遇是命運的安排。

fault.en: It was my fault that we were late.

favor.en: Could you do me a favor?

favorite.zh: 藍色是我最喜歡的顏色。

fear.en: She has a great fear of spiders.

feature.en: The phone has many new features.
feature.zh: 這支手機有許多新功能。

fee.en: The entrance fee is one hundred dollars.

feeling.en: I had a feeling that something was wrong.

fellow.en: He helped his fellow students with homework.

female.en: A female lion hunts for the group.

fever.en: The child has a high fever.

field.en: The cows are grazing in the field.

figure.en: I can't figure out this puzzle.
figure.zh: 我想不出這個謎題的答案。

final.en: This is the final question of the test.

fireman-firewoman.en: The fireman rescued the cat from the tree.
fireman-firewoman.zh: 消防員把貓從樹上救下來。

firm.zh: 她給了一個堅定的回答。

fisherman.en: The fisherman caught a big fish.

fix.zh: 爸爸修好了我壞掉的腳踏車。

flag.en: The national flag waved in the wind.

flat.en: We need flat ground to build a house.
flat.zh: 我們需要平坦的地來蓋房子。

flight.en: Our flight leaves at six in the morning.
flight.zh: 我們的班機早上六點起飛。

flow.en: The river flows into the sea.

flu.en: She stayed home with the flu.

fog.en: Thick fog made it hard to see.

folk.en: She sang an old folk song.
folk.zh: 她唱了一首古老的民謠。

foolish.en: It was foolish to play with fire.

football.en: They played football in the rain.

force.en: The strong wind has great force.

forest.en: Many animals live in the forest.

forgive.en: Please forgive me for my mistake.

form.en: Water can take the form of ice.

formal.en: He wore a formal suit to the wedding.
formal.zh: 他穿著正式的西裝去婚禮。

former.en: She is a former teacher of mine.

forth.en: They walked back and forth nervously.

forward-forwards.en: He leaned forwards to hear better.

found.zh: 他們在 1950 年創立了這所學校。

fox.en: A clever fox lives in the woods.
fox.zh: 一隻聰明的狐狸住在樹林裡。

freedom.zh: 每個人都想要自由與和平。

friendship.zh: 他們的友誼維持了許多年。

fries.en: He ordered a burger and fries.
fries.zh: 他點了一個漢堡和薯條。

fry.en: Mom is frying eggs for breakfast.

function.en: The heart's function is to pump blood.
function.zh: 心臟的功能是輸送血液。

furniture.en: They bought new furniture for the house.
furniture.zh: 他們為房子買了新家具。

further.en: We need further information about it.
further.zh: 我們需要更多關於它的資訊。

gain.en: He gained weight over the holidays.

garlic.en: She added garlic to the soup.

gather.en: People gathered to watch the parade.

general.en: In general, the weather here is warm.
general.zh: 一般來說，這裡的天氣很溫暖。

generous.en: She is generous and often helps others.
generous.zh: 她很慷慨，經常幫助別人。

gentle.en: Be gentle with the little kitten.

gentleman.en: A gentleman opened the door for her.

giraffe.en: The giraffe has a very long neck.

glue.en: She used glue to fix the paper.

goal.en: My goal is to read fifty books this year.
goal.zh: 我的目標是今年讀五十本書。

goat.en: The goat is eating grass on the hill.

gold.en: The ring is made of pure gold.

golden.en: The fields turned golden in autumn.
golden.zh: 秋天時田野變成金黃色。

goose.en: A goose can be quite noisy.

govern.en: Leaders are chosen to govern the country.
govern.zh: 領袖被選出來治理國家。

government.en: The government built a new road.

gradual.en: There was a gradual change in the weather.
gradual.zh: 天氣出現了漸進的變化。

grain.en: Rice and wheat are kinds of grain.

grand.en: They held a grand opening for the store.
grand.zh: 他們為店舖舉辦了盛大的開幕。

grape.en: These grapes are sweet and juicy.

greet.en: She greeted us with a warm smile.
greet.zh: 她用溫暖的微笑迎接我們。

guard.en: A guard stood at the gate.

guava.en: Guava is a popular fruit in Taiwan.
guava.zh: 番石榴是台灣很受歡迎的水果。

guest.en: We have guests coming for dinner.
guest.zh: 我們有客人要來吃晚餐。

guide.en: The guide showed us around the museum.
guide.zh: 導遊帶我們參觀博物館。

gymnasium-gym.en: We exercise in the school gym.
gymnasium-gym.zh: 我們在學校體育館運動。

haircut.en: I got a new haircut yesterday.

hall.en: The students gathered in the hall.

hamburger-burger.en: I had a hamburger for lunch.

handle.zh: 她冷靜地處理了這個問題。

handsome.en: The actor is tall and handsome.

heaven.en: The view from the mountain was like heaven.
heaven.zh: 山上的景色像天堂一樣。

highly.en: She is a highly skilled doctor.
highly.zh: 她是一位技術高超的醫生。

highway.en: We drove fast on the highway.
highway.zh: 我們在高速公路上快速行駛。

hike.en: We went on a hike in the mountains.

hip.en: She put her hands on her hips.

hippopotamus-hippo.en: The hippo stayed cool in the water.
hippopotamus-hippo.zh: 河馬待在水裡保持涼爽。

historical.zh: 我們參觀了許多歷史古蹟。

hole.en: There is a hole in my sock.

hop.en: The rabbit hopped across the grass.
hop.zh: 兔子蹦蹦跳跳越過草地。

host-hostess.en: The host welcomed all the guests.

huge.en: An elephant is a huge animal.
huge.zh: 大象是一種巨大的動物。

human.en: Every human needs food and water.
human.zh: 每個人都需要食物和水。

humble.en: Even though he is famous, he stays humble.
humble.zh: 雖然他很有名，但他依然謙虛。

hunter.en: The hunter walked quietly through the woods.

hurry.en: Hurry up, or we'll miss the bus.
hurry.zh: 快一點，不然我們會錯過公車。

ideal.en: This is an ideal place for a picnic.

identity.en: Please show some proof of your identity.

ill.en: He has been ill for a week.

image.en: The image on the screen was clear.

imagine.en: Imagine you could fly like a bird.

importance.en: We learned the importance of teamwork.
importance.zh: 我們學到了團隊合作的重要性。

impressive.zh: 她的表演非常令人印象深刻。

improve.zh: 練習會讓你的英文進步。

income.en: Their family has a small income.

indeed.en: It was indeed a wonderful day.

independence.en: The country gained its independence in 1947.
independence.zh: 這個國家在 1947 年獲得獨立。

independent.en: She is independent and lives alone.

indicate.en: The sign indicates the way to the station.
indicate.zh: 這個標誌指示往車站的路。

individual.zh: 每個人都有不同的需求。

industry.en: The car industry is growing fast.

influence.en: Friends have a big influence on us.
influence.zh: 朋友對我們有很大的影響。

ink.en: The pen ran out of ink.

insist.en: She insisted on paying the bill.

instance.en: For instance, apples are good for you.
instance.zh: 舉例來說，蘋果對你有益。

instant.en: I made an instant noodle for lunch.

instead.en: Let's walk instead of taking the bus.
instead.zh: 我們走路吧，不要搭公車。

instrument.en: The violin is a beautiful instrument.
instrument.zh: 小提琴是一種優美的樂器。

internal.en: The body has many internal organs.

internet-internet.en: I look up information on the Internet.

introduce.en: Let me introduce you to my friend.
introduce.zh: 讓我把你介紹給我的朋友。

introduction.en: The book has a short introduction.
introduction.zh: 這本書有一段簡短的引言。

iron.en: She used an iron to press the shirt.

jam.en: I spread jam on my toast.

jog.en: I jog in the park every morning.
jog.zh: 我每天早上在公園慢跑。

joint.en: They made a joint decision together.
joint.zh: 他們一起做了共同的決定。

journal.en: She keeps a journal of her travels.

judge.en: The judge listened to both sides.
judge.zh: 法官聽取了雙方的說法。

judgment-judgement.zh: 我相信你良好的判斷力。

justice.en: Everyone hopes for justice and fairness.
justice.zh: 每個人都期望正義與公平。

ketchup.en: He put ketchup on his fries.

kilogram.en: The bag of rice weighs five kilograms.

lack.en: The plant died from a lack of water.
lack.zh: 這株植物因缺水而枯死。

lady.en: A kind lady helped me find the way.
lady.zh: 一位親切的女士幫我找到路。

ladybug.en: A ladybug landed on the leaf.

lamb.en: The little lamb followed its mother.

lane.en: Cars must stay in their own lane.
lane.zh: 車輛必須保持在自己的車道上。

lantern.en: We hung lanterns for the festival.

lap.en: The runner finished the final lap.

latest.en: Have you heard the latest news?
latest.zh: 你聽到最新的消息了嗎？

latter.en: Of the two choices, I prefer the latter.
latter.zh: 兩個選項中，我比較喜歡後者。

law.zh: 每個人都必須遵守法律。

lay.en: She laid the baby on the bed.

leadership.en: Good leadership helps a team succeed.
leadership.zh: 良好的領導力幫助團隊成功。

leaf.en: A yellow leaf fell from the tree.

legal.en: It is legal to drive at eighteen here.
legal.zh: 在這裡十八歲開車是合法的。

lend.en: Can you lend me your umbrella?
lend.zh: 你可以借我你的雨傘嗎？

length.en: The length of the rope is two meters.
length.zh: 這條繩子的長度是兩公尺。

liberal.en: He has liberal views on many topics.
liberal.zh: 他對許多議題抱持開放的觀點。

lid.en: Please put the lid on the pot.

lift.en: He lifted the heavy box easily.
lift.zh: 他輕鬆地舉起那個重箱子。

likely.en: It is likely to rain this afternoon.

limit.en: There is a speed limit on this road.

link.en: Click the link to open the page.
